tagline: Expert Pool Service for Queen Creek, Mesa, Gilbert & Chandler

hero.headline: 21 Years Keeping East Valley Pools Perfect
hero.subheadline: From weekly maintenance to 24/7 emergency repairs, Complete Aquatic Solutions has been the East Valley's trusted pool care partner since 2005. Sit back, relax, and let Jeff and the team handle everything.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care for Every<br class="hidden md:block"> East Valley Home & Business
services.subtitle: From routine weekly cleanings to complex commercial systems, we bring 21 years of hands-on expertise to every job. Your pool deserves a team that treats it like their own.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Comprehensive weekly cleaning, chemical balancing, and filter maintenance that keeps your pool crystal clear and swim-ready every single day of the year.

cards.title: 24/7 Emergency Repairs
cards.description: Pump failure at midnight? Leak on a holiday? Our emergency team responds around the clock so your pool problems never have to wait.

cards.title: Advanced Leak Detection
cards.description: State-of-the-art technology to pinpoint hidden leaks in shells, plumbing, and equipment pads — saving you water, money, and costly structural damage.

cards.title: Equipment Upgrades
cards.description: Professional installation of pumps, filters, heaters, salt systems, and automation controls. We upgrade your equipment for better efficiency and lower energy bills.

cards.title: Pool Chemistry Management
cards.description: Expert water analysis and balancing that keeps your water safe, clear, and gentle on skin. No red eyes, no algae, no guesswork.

cards.title: Commercial Pool Services
cards.description: Specialized maintenance for HOA community pools, apartment complexes, and hotels. Full health code compliance and dedicated account management included.

steps.title: Request Your Free Assessment
steps.description: Call us or fill out the form. Jeff will personally review your pool's needs and provide an honest, no-pressure quote within 24 hours.

steps.title: We Handle Every Detail
steps.description: Our experienced technicians arrive on schedule with everything needed. Cleaning, chemicals, equipment checks, and repairs — all handled professionally.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Perfect Pool
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and worry-free all year long. With 21 years of experience behind every visit, you can finally just relax and swim.

about.label: Why East Valley Trusts Us
about.headline: Locally Owned, Personally Managed — Since 2005
about.description: When Jeff Niegsch started Complete Aquatic Solutions in 2005, he made a simple promise: treat every pool like it was his own. Twenty-one years later, that commitment hasn't changed. From Queen Creek to Chandler, our team delivers responsive, reliable pool care backed by a BBB A+ rating and thousands of satisfied customers. We answer our phones, show up on time, and never cut corners.

features.title: Licensed Arizona Contractor
features.description: Fully licensed, bonded, and insured pool contractor in the state of Arizona with over two decades of proven field experience.

features.title: 24/7 Emergency Availability
features.description: Pool emergencies don't wait for business hours. Neither do we. Call anytime, day or night, and we'll be there.

features.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
features.description: Not happy with a service visit? We come back and make it right at no extra charge. Your satisfaction is our reputation.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. Zero Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the service level that fits your pool. Flexible plans, no contracts, and honest pricing from a team that's been doing this for 21 years.

guarantee.headline: Our "Crystal Clear" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not 100% satisfied with any service visit, call Jeff directly. We'll come back and make it right at no additional cost — no questions asked, no runaround. We've built our reputation on doing right by our customers for over 21 years, and we're not about to stop now.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new clients in Queen Creek, Mesa, Gilbert, and Chandler are scheduled within 3-5 business days. For emergency situations like equipment failures or green pools, we offer same-day or next-day response.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home for service visits?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most of our clients provide gate access and we take care of everything while you're away. After each visit, you'll know exactly what was done and the current state of your pool.

faqs.question: Are your technicians licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes. Complete Aquatic Solutions is a licensed Arizona pool contractor with full liability insurance. Our technicians are experienced professionals with years of hands-on training.

faqs.question: Do you require long-term contracts?
faqs.answer: No contracts, no cancellation fees. We believe in earning your business every single visit. You stay because the service is excellent, not because you're locked in.

faqs.question: Do you handle commercial and HOA pools?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We service HOA community pools, apartment complexes, hotels, and other commercial facilities throughout the East Valley. Commercial clients receive dedicated account management and flexible scheduling.

testimonials.name: Toni P.
testimonials.text: Jeff and Mark do great work!! I used them for most of my properties when I was an HOA Manager and now we share referrals. This company is always responsive, especially for emergencies or any major pool issues. They really care about their customers!

testimonials.name: Community Pool Client
testimonials.text: Complete Aquatic Solutions has been maintaining our community pool for years. Their team is always professional, on time, and thorough. We never have to worry about water quality or equipment issues because they stay on top of everything.

testimonials.name: East Valley Homeowner
testimonials.text: Called them for an emergency repair on a weekend and they responded right away. Fixed the pump issue quickly and at a fair price. You can tell they genuinely care about their customers and take pride in their work.
